title: turnera ulmifolia var. ulmifolia
intro: Turnera ulmifolia var. ulmifolia, also known as Damiana, is a perennial plant native to Mexico and the southwestern United States, characterized by its yellow flowers and oval-shaped leaves. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Damiana include relief from anxiety and stress, improved sleep quality, and increased libido, as well as potential relief from symptoms of menopause and irritable bowel syndrome. Damiana can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in herbal supplements to support overall well-being and reproductive health.
